Creator Club

Creator Club

Creator Club is a session-based membership for planning, recording, editing, and finishing projects. It gives creators a structured place to learn, keep moving, and turn an idea into a finished release.

Creator Club Sessions

Creator Club Sessions give clients one-on-one support, guidance, and production services for their entire project. From learning production tools and writing, to session planning, full production and release, Twirl Tape is there every step of the way.

A Month of Membership

Projects come in all shapes and sizes. Some need more focus in certain areas than others. Creator Club gives members a flexible way to get the support and production help they need, where they need it. Some clients may finish a full project in one month. Others may spend that time learning the process, writing, planning, and getting ready for production with guidance and coaching.

Add-Ons

Some projects need more than guidance, support, and production. For full service, music production, scoring, voiceover talent, extra studio time, or custom production needs, add-ons for Creator Club and Services are available.
